content: Create an expression to add ScheduledEEAmount and ScheduledERAmount

This expression will add the scheduled employee amount and the scheduled employer amount to give you the total scheduled amount.

```
Add(Value(ScheduledEEAmount), Value(ScheduledERAmount))
```

This expression will produce a **Numeric** output.

Suggested column name: **Total Scheduled Amount**
{{SUGGESTED_ACTIONS:Use this expression|Test with my data|Explain this expression}}
